IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (31243710.pdf)
SUMMARY: Experienced IT professional with a background in network engineering, server management, and software solutions. Skilled in various operating systems, databases, and security protocols. Proven track record of cost-saving initiatives through efficient use of resources.
